description_long: This sculpture depicts two human male figures, one standing and the other slumped and headless, both rendered in a classical style with detailed musculature and anatomical accuracy. The standing figure is youthful and nude, holding an object in his right hand and supporting the larger, limp figure draped over his shoulder. The larger figure appears lifeless or unconscious, with his head missing and his body slumping backward, supported by the smaller figure. The base of the sculpture is irregular and textured, suggesting a rocky or naturalistic ground. The entire piece is monochromatic, with a smooth, stone-like finish and subtle surface details. The composition conveys a dramatic narrative, possibly referencing mythological or historical themes.
description: A dramatic, classical-style sculpture of two male figures, one supporting the limp, headless body of the other, rendered in smooth, pale stone.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures clearly, with the standing youth supporting the headless, slumped figure.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the backward arch of the larger figure and the supporting posture of the youth.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the muscular back of the larger figure and the intertwined forms of both bodies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dramatic lean and the detailed anatomy of both figures.
attribute_subject_matter: two human male figures, one supporting a limp, headless body
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
